home.title: Start with the service that fits best and finish the enquiry with clear context
home.body: If you already know what you need, go straight to the service. If you are still comparing options, review the company context as well or move to contact for guidance.

servicesIndex.title: Compare the service and move toward a more precise enquiry
servicesIndex.body: Each card leads to a detailed page. If you prefer to explain the case directly, you can move to contact or review the company page before writing.

journey.title: This service is often reviewed together with related needs and an early consultation
journey.body: You can return to the service index to compare, review the company page or go straight to contact to explain the case in more detail.

related.title: Solutions often reviewed together with this service
related.body: The audit of the current website connects these blocks as complementary services within the same technical need.

faqCta.title: Do you need a more precise assessment?
faqCta.body: If the answer depends on the space, the existing installation or a combination of services, the best next step is to send the enquiry through contact.

about.title: After the company context, the natural path moves to service and contact
about.body: If you have already reviewed the audited company base, you can move into the confirmed services or write directly to explain the need.

contact.title: Not sure which service fits best?
contact.body: You can review the three confirmed services or return to the company page before sending the form. If you prefer to speak directly, you can also call.
